title: Skillet Pork Carbonara
description: A classic Italian-American dish made with smoky pork, eggs, and parmesan cheese. Cooked to perfection in a skillet.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the crumbled bacon and cook until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the pork chops to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in 2 cups of heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the shredded cheese until melted.
Return the pork to the skillet and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with crispy bacon and chopped parsley.
Let the dish rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
